question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: '] [Function: main(String[] args)] Can an unprivileged external user pass `--hiero.mirror.importer.db.host=attacker.com` via `args` to `SpringApplication.run()` to redirect the importer's database connection to an attacker-controlled PostgreSQL server, enabling credential harvesting via a fake PostgreSQL handshake?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: '] [Function: main(String[] args)] Can an unprivileged external user inject `--hiero.mirror.importer.db.sslMode=DISABLE` via `args` to `SpringApplication.run()` to downgrade the database TLS connection to plaintext, enabling network-level eavesdropping of all SQL queries and responses including sensitive blockchain data?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: '] [Function: main(String[] args)] Can an unprivileged external user supply `--hiero.mirror.importer.db.connectionInitSql=DROP TABLE entity;` via `args` to `SpringApplication.run()` to inject malicious SQL into the `DBProperties.connectionInitSql` field that executes on every new HikariCP connection, causing persistent database destruction?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: '] [Function: main(String[] args)] Can an unprivileged external user pass `--hiero.mirror.importer.dataPath=/tmp/attacker` via `args` to `SpringApplication.run()` to redirect the importer's data directory to an attacker-controlled path, causing downloaded stream files to be written to a location accessible by other processes?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: '] [Function: main(String[] args)] Can an unprivileged external user supply `--hiero.mirror.importer.downloader.bucketName=attacker-bucket` via `args` to `SpringApplication.run()` to redirect block/record stream downloads to an attacker-controlled cloud storage bucket, injecting forged blockchain data into the mirror node?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: '] [Function: main(String[] args)] Can an unprivileged external user pass `--hiero.mirror.importer.downloader.accessKey=attacker&--hiero.mirror.importer.downloader.secretKey=attacker` via `args` to `SpringApplication.run()` to override cloud storage credentials, causing the importer to authenticate to an attacker-controlled bucket?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: '] [Function: main(String[] args)] Can an unprivileged external user inject `--hiero.mirror.importer.downloader.allowAnonymousAccess=true` via `args` to `SpringApplication.run()` to enable anonymous cloud storage access, bypassing credential-based access controls on the stream file bucket?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: '] [Function: main(String[] args)] Can an unprivileged external user supply `--hiero.mirror.importer.block.nodes[0].host=attacker.com` via `args` to `SpringApplication.run()` to redirect block node connections to an attacker-controlled gRPC server, enabling injection of forged block stream data?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: '] [Function: main(String[] args)] Can an unprivileged external user pass `--hiero.mirror.importer.block.nodes[0].requiresTls=false` via `args` to `SpringApplication.run()` to disable TLS for block node connections, enabling plaintext interception of block stream data in transit?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: '] [Function: main(String[] args)] Can an unprivileged external user inject `--hiero.mirror.importer.block.stream.maxBlockItems=2147483647` via `args` to `SpringApplication.run()` to remove the block item limit, causing the importer to allocate unbounded memory when processing a crafted oversized block, leading to OOM and denial of service?

[File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/ImporterApplication.java -> Scope: '] [Function: main(String[] args)] Can an unprivileged external user supply `--hiero.mirror.importer.block.stream.maxStreamResponseSize=10000MB` via `args` to `SpringApplication.run()` to increase the maximum stream response size to an extreme value, enabling a memory exhaustion attack via a crafted oversized gRPC response?
